title: Connected Glass
description: Makes glass blocks and panes connect seamlessly!
body: [![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-Profile-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=teal)](https://modrinth.com/user/PrincParshia) --- ## 📗 DESCRIPTION This is a sleek add-on for Minecraft, making glass textures seamlessly connect for a cleaner, more modern look. This pack keeps the default style of Minecraft while enhancing the appearance of glass blocks and panes, giving your builds a polished, uninterrupted feel. ## ❗ REQUIREMENTS > For **Fabric/Quilt/Neo/Forge**: Use **[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)**. > For **Forge/Other**: Use **[OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home)**. ---
